hero.title: Puerto Agua Verde & Rancho San Cosme
hero.desc: A natural destination in Baja California Sur where tranquility, tradition, and spectacular landscapes meet authentic coastal life. Explore beaches, local experiences, trails, and services to plan your visit.

gallery.title: Organize your trip
gallery.desc: Explore activities, places, and services available at the port and the ranch. Filter by category or select a card to see more details.

puerto.title: Puerto Agua Verde
puerto.text: Puerto Agua Verde is a small corner of Baja California Sur known for its turquoise waters, community atmosphere, and untouched nature. Here, traditional fishing, quiet beaches, and outdoor activities combine to attract travelers in search of authenticity and peace.

rancho.title: Rancho San Cosme
rancho.text: Rancho San Cosme is a historical and cultural space where rural life remains alive. Surrounded by mountains and desert vegetation, it is a meeting point for visitors seeking local experiences, trails, guided activities, and connection with nature.

stories.title: Discover the destination
stories.subtitle: Learn about the history and culture of these unique places

experiences.title: Experiences to enjoy
experiences.desc: Discover unique activities to connect with nature, local culture, and community hospitality.

accommodation.title: Stay with us
accommodation.desc: Find accommodation options that combine comfort, nature, and a privileged view of the landscape.

restaurants.title: Flavors of the region
restaurants.desc: From fresh seafood to traditional cuisine, discover the places where you can enjoy local gastronomy.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.subtitle: Discover the best options for your visit

map.title: Destination Map
map.desc: Explore key points of Puerto Agua Verde and Rancho San Cosme. Find routes, services, beaches, and activities near you.

finalCta.title: Your journey begins here
finalCta.desc: Puerto Agua Verde and Rancho San Cosme are more than places on the map — they are living landscapes of sea, desert, and tradition. Plan your stay, explore local experiences, and discover the rhythm of authentic Baja life.

footer.title: Quick Links
footer.aboutTitle: Puerto Agua Verde y Rancho San Cosme
footer.desc: An official community guide to Puerto Agua Verde & Rancho San Cosme, Baja California Sur. Discover, explore, and experience responsibly.
footer.thanks: Thank you for visiting and for helping keep this place special. Travel with care, support local, and leave only footprints.
footer.note: For updates on weather, road conditions, and local notices, follow our social channels.

modal.dummyDesc: Discover the beauty and history of this unique location. Our guided tours offer an authentic look at local life, culture, and the stunning natural landscapes of the region.
